creator: Eliya Hachem
source_text:
Creamy Lemon Garlic Chicken Bowls with a creamy low cal mash ✨

Recipe serves 4 and is only 470 cals with 41g protein per serve 🫶

Full recipe is in the link in my bio (press “all my latest recipes”) OR comment “Recipe” and I’ll send the recipe link straight to your DM’s ✨

expected.name: Creamy Lemon Garlic Chicken Bowls with a creamy low cal mash

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The description supplies a title and yield but directs readers elsewhere for the full recipe; description-only fallback is expected.
Accepted after generic nearby-yield corroboration for a longer first-line title; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase was used.
